subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast and firmly established in the Cause of the Ancient Beauty, who hold fast to the sure handle that cannot be broken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستقیمین و ثابتین بر امر جمال قدم و متشبثین بالعروه الوثقی التی لا انفصام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
